Native
4 - Asian
5 - Hispanic
6 - Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander
7 - Hispanic and one or more races
8 - more than 1 race
9 - unknown
Null/missing - unknown or no Medicaid enrollment data
D_MEDICARE_COV_START Medicare Coverage Start Date - First occurrence of Medicare (A or B) coverage based on Medicare enrollment date - MM/DD/YYYY
D_MEDICAID_COV_START Medicaid Coverage Start Date - First occurrence since 1999 of Medicaid coverage, regardless of state (source: Uniform eligibility code from
